sourcesContent:
import { Grid, Paper,Stack,Button,Typography } from '@mui/material'
import React from 'react'
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'
import signpng from '.'

export const Signup = () => {
    const navigate = useNavigate()
  return (
    <Grid container
    justifyContent="center"
    alignItems="center"
    style={{ minHeight: '100vh' }}>


        <Paper sx={{padding:'25px', width: 'auto', height: '300px'}} elevation={10}>
        <Stack justifyContent='center' alignItems='center' spacing={20}>
        <Typography variant='h2'>Hello world how are you</Typography>
        <Stack direction='vertical'>
        
        <Button variant='contained' onClick={()=>{navigate('/signup')}}>Signup</Button>

        </Stack>
    </Stack>
        </Paper>


    </Grid>
  )
}
